body:
## Problem
Only 10 "How to Sound Like" guides exist. Zero guides for the next tier of high-intent drummers where GSC signals and fanbase depth justify expansion:

- **Matt Greiner** (August Burns Red) — GSC: 17 impr / 11.76% CTR for "matt greiner drum setup". Prog metalcore audience actively seeking his technique.
- **George Kollias** (Nile) — Guinness-certified fastest blast beat; "george kollias blast beat" is a standalone search cluster. Just filed for article (#1709 in ai-fix); sound-like guide compounds the cluster.
- **Travis Orbin** (Periphery) — Djent pioneer, extremely technical playing style. "travis orbin drum technique" intent is high among djent/prog community.
- **Flo Mounier** (Cryptopsy) — "Who Was Called?" blast beat is a canonical death metal benchmark. Builds the blast-beat cluster alongside Derek Roddy and Pete Sandoval articles.

## Files to touch
1. `packages/frontend/data/soundLikeGuides.js` — add 4 new guide entries:
   - `how-to-sound-like-matt-greiner`
   - `how-to-sound-like-george-kollias`
   - `how-to-sound-like-travis-orbin`
   - `how-to-sound-like-flo-mounier`
2. `public/llms/guides/how-to-sound-like-<slug>.md` — 4 LLM markdown files
3. `api/sitemap.js` already dynamic: `soundLikeGuides.map(g => ...)` — auto-includes new entries

## Guide template (per drummer, ~800-1200 words)
Each guide sections:
- Overview of drummer's unique playing style and influence
- 3-4 technique sections (e.g., "The Greiner Pocket Blast", "Kolossus Foot Technique")
- Recommended gear to approximate their sound (drums, cymbals, pedals, heads)
- 2-3 practice drills with musical reference points
- FAQ section (≥3 Q&A)
- Internal links: drummer profile + lick pages + relevant album articles (≥3 links)

## Sitemap
Auto-included via existing `soundLikeGuides.map(g => ({ loc: /guides/${g.slug}, priority: 0.9 }))` once data entries are added.

## GSC query alignment
- "matt greiner drum sound / how to play like matt greiner" → Matt Greiner guide
- "george kollias blast beat technique" / "fastest blast beat" → George Kollias guide
- "travis orbin djent drumming / how to play like travis orbin" → Travis Orbin guide
- "flo mounier blast beat" / "cryptopsy drum technique" → Flo Mounier guide

## Quality gate
- Each guide ≥800 words
- ≥3 technique sections
- FAQ section ≥3 Q&A
- ≥3 internal links per guide (drummer profile + lick hub + album article)
- LLM markdown file created alongside each guide

## Verify
1. `/guides/how-to-sound-like-matt-greiner` loads with full guide content
2. All 4 new guides appear in `/guides` hub listing
3. Sitemap includes all 4 new `/guides/how-to-sound-like-<slug>` URLs
4. LLM files exist at `public/llms/guides/how-to-sound-like-*.md`
5. Internal links from guide to drummer profile resolve (no 404)

## Done
4 new sound-like guides live at `/guides/how-to-sound-like-<slug>` with full technique content + LLM markdown files; all 4 appear in sitemap.
title: SEO batch: SoundLike guide expansion — 4 new drummers (Matt Greiner, George Kollias, Travis Orbin, Flo Mounier) (~4 guide pages)
